content:
# Velocity Semblance

**Summary**: A measure of the similarity between two signals, used here to identify consistent velocity values.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2020-alzahrani|Alzahrani, 2020]] calculated velocity semblance for both conventional and linear methods.

## Scientific Context

- [[2020-alzahrani|Alzahrani, 2020]] Used to determine the best-fit velocity for stacking.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2020-alzahrani|Alzahrani, 2020]] Computed from the cross-power or similarity of signals.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The results show that stacking velocities picked using the squaring technique are similar or better than those selected conventionally. ([[2020-alzahrani|Alzahrani, 2020, p. 17]])
